arts.ttl: 'As long as we don't get humped': Rod Stewart makes Celtic vs Bayern prediction
arts.sum: Rod Stewart looked in a buoyant mood as he gatecrashed the TNT Sports coverage ahead of Celtic’s UEFA Champions League tie against Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Tipsy Rod Stewart gatecrashes Celtic TV coverage, steals a microphone and makes confession to Jamie Carragher
arts.sum: The 80-year-old swanned past the touchline as he interjected himself on a pre-match segment involving Owen Hargreaves

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Bayern-Celtic, Milan-Feyenoord
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Wednesday's Champions League action as Bayern Munich take on Celtic, AC Milan face Feyenoord and AS Monaco take on Benfica.

arts.ttl: Rodgers on 'easy' Celtic vs Bayern selection, explains Jota's bench role
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers has explained why Jota starts on the bench this evening.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers names Celtic starting XI to take on Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers names Celtic starting XI to take on Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Celtic v Bayern Munich: Champions League playoff round, first leg – live
arts.sum: Champions League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Read the latest Football Daily | Mail Will Justin Kavanagh emails: “Great photo of Rod! He’s certainly got the gladrags on tonight, but does that bandage on his right fist suggest he’s already had some handbags? If so, it probably won’t be the last we’ll see at Celtic Park tonight in what should be a quite tasty match. Don’t spare the Rod, Bhoys.” The main plan for Celtic here is to keep it tight early on against one of the most exciting front fours in Europe. You do not get many Musiala-type players in the Scottish Premiership. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher questions Brendan Rodgers' achievements at Celtic with Rangers claim
arts.sum: But Celtic fan Quinny, who was a special guest, put Carragher right and pointed towards Scottish football getting ‘talked down’. Jamie Carragher questions Brendan Rodgers’ success at Celtic as Rangers are ‘so bad’

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen's Granit Xhaka: "I'm convinced we'll beat Bayern Munich"
arts.sum: Granit Xhaka says defending champions Bayer Leverkusen are ready to rise to the occasion when they face Bayern Munich on Matchday 22, arguably needing a win to have any chance of reeling in the Bundesliga leaders. Xhaka: "We won't go into the game with the plan to play for a draw, we want to win every game, whether that's against Bayern on Saturday, or against any other team.

arts.ttl: Celtic handed ANOTHER Champions League write-off verdict by German media
arts.sum: Celtic handed another Champions League write-off verdict by the same source.

arts.ttl: Celtic to face Hibs in Scottish Cup quarter-final
arts.sum: Celtic's opponents for the quarter-finals of the Scottish Cup have been confirmed.
